events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need respond exactly one valid JSON object matching schema. No prose outside. Determine decision fail because missing supplemental electrode. Need fill fields reasonably. Need reference NEC 250.53(C), maybe supplemental electrode requirement: if single rod/pipe or plate electrode has >25 ohms, supplemental required; two electrodes at least 6 ft apart. Also 250.50 requires grounding electrode system. Missing supplemental electrode: non-compliant, installed-defective. Risk maybe high (safety). Work stage rough-complete. Percent complete maybe 80? Value irrelevant. Sound etc defaults. Findings: missing supplemental electrode, no second electrode/insufficient impedance verification. Actions: install supplemental electrode per NEC, test resistance, coordinate inspection. Rationale. References NEC 250.53(C), 250.50, 250.56 maybe. Required schema references list. Include component_conditions ["non-compliant"]. Could also installed-defective? Missing component, not defective installed. Use non-compliant only.

Need ensure JSON raw no markdown.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 85,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Grounding electrode system is missing the required supplemental electrode.",
    "No evidence of resistance testing or verification that a single electrode meets the 25-ohm threshold.",
    "System cannot be considered complete or compliant for rough-in inspection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a supplemental grounding electrode at the required spacing and bonding per NEC.",
    "Perform ground resistance testing per NEC 250.53/250.56 and document results.",
    "Schedule re-inspection before closing in or energizing the system."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 250.53(C) requires a supplemental electrode when a single rod, pipe, or plate electrode does not achieve 25 ohms or less to ground. The observed field condition shows the supplemental electrode is missing, so the grounding electrode system is incomplete and non-compliant.",
  "references": ["NEC 250.50", "NEC 250.53(C)", "NEC 250.56"]
}
